name: western-rice-bowl
input: a chipotle-style chicken rice bowl with brown rice, black beans, salsa, and guacamole
notes: USDA composite: 200g brown rice ~220 kcal, 130g chicken thigh ~225 kcal, 100g black beans ~130 kcal, 30g salsa ~10 kcal, 60g guacamole ~135 kcal. Advisory tier — guac portion + add-ons (cheese, sour cream omitted) drive variance.
